task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: What happens if the system is switched off

abstract.p: What happens if the system is switched off (mains switch off / mains cables disconnected / mains supply in the building switched off)?

note.p: Make sure the cover of the system is closed to prevent light on uncured ink.

li.p: The APSU is switched off. Under-pressure for the printheads is decreasing.
After 2 hours ink leakage of the printhead can occur.
Typical: After 12 - 48 hours the ink leakage starts. Additional cleaning actions are required.
The maintenance unit does not perform automatic maintenance actions. For example the pressure pulses for the printheads are not carried out. This can lead to additional maintenance actions.
